# Legacy URL redirects (Omeka Classic → Hugo).
#
# Generated by omeka-to-hugo; sorted and deterministic across re-runs.
# Format: <from-path>  <to-path>  <status>
#
# Netlify / Cloudflare Pages: drop this file in as `_redirects`.
#
# Caddy:   handle /items/browse* { redir /items/ 301 }
#          @byCollection query collection=*
#          handle @byCollection { redir /collections/{query.collection}/ 301 }
#
# nginx:   rewrite ^/items/browse$ /items/ permanent;
#          if ($arg_collection) { return 301 /collections/$arg_collection/; }
#
# Per-item (/items/show/<id>) and per-collection (/collections/show/<id>)
# legacy URLs are already covered by Hugo aliases (HTML meta-refresh pages
# generated under public/) and are not duplicated here.
/collections	/collections/	301
/collections/browse	/collections/	301
/items	/items/	301
